title: Pupi Maxi Arashaka Gukina
description: Pupi Maxi arashka gukina . Ariko burimunu wese nakanya afite.

pages.text:
Arakina nabo ataraja kubyama burimunsi.
Max arasuhuza ukwezi mumuhanda .Ukwezi kuramusekyera.

Max araja kwita izahabu .
Izahabu ikunda gukina nimbeba munzuye
 Ariko namwanya afite.

Max araja kwita mushutiwe Munwani witwa Firefly.
Munwani arikurera omwana mwishitsi we .Ababyeyi ba Munwani nago bari murugo.
Nakanya afite.

Maxi yita mushutiwe yitwa jaka imbwa.
Jaka ari guronda imbuto gukora jii.
Nawe namwanya afite.

Maxi arahamagara mushutiwe undi Ijwi  Agachurama.
 Ijwi ririmo kwiga kunu bafata.
Ijwi naryo namwanya rifite.

Insenene Codi yari winyuma Maxi yariyizeye.
Codi yararimo kugyenda hanze yumwanya umunsi ukurikira. Yararimo gutunganya ibinubye.
 Namwanya yari afite.

Burimunuwese namwanya afite .
Maxi arajerarejeza kubyama ariko biranga .
Arababaye.

Namutu  yashobora kureba Maxi ababaye.
Mukanya Maxi atarabyama ,burimunu wese arasakuza. "itangazo".
Bose barakina hamwe mukanya .

Maxi aragaruka murugo anazerewe chane amaze gukina ninshuti ze.
Mama wa maxi aramubwira ngo nakanya kurugyero mumuburiri.
Maxi ahita ibitosti bimufata.

Pupi Maxi afite inshuti nziza itandatu kandi arishimye kubera nazo.
 Ushobora kumenya mushuti wa maxi wagatandatu?
Ufite abashuti bangahe abaza?
Urabeshimisha?
